final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: main menu UI chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate UI kit sheet for main menu buttons, frames, stats panels, and menu icons.
Subject: a clean UI component sheet containing primary button, secondary button, outer border frame, stats panel frame, small icon medallions for profile/settings/achievements/relics/mastery/best run.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, dark stone, beveled metal, antique gold trim, mobile readable.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet on neutral background, components separated with padding, no labels, no text baked into buttons.
Lighting/mood: premium but restrained menu UI.
Color palette: charcoal stone, blackened steel, antique gold, subtle cyan/violet elemental accents.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, no dense ornament that hurts readability.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
